headline: Red-Hot AI Stock Western Digital Slides Late Despite Earnings Beat
summary: Western Digital stock slipped late Thursday despite the data storage company, which recently rebranded as WD, reported fiscal third-quarter results that exceeded Wall Street forecasts. Expectations were elevated as WD's shares have already soared nearly 900% over the past 12 months.

headline: The HDD Trade Just Crushed Everything in April: WDC and STX Lead the Picks-and-Shovels Rotation
summary: Shares of Seagate Technology (NASDAQ:STX) and Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) capped a blockbuster April with another leg higher Thursday afternoon. WDC stock added 5% midday, trading near $434, while STX stock rose 1% to trade near $650. Impressively, STX gained 65% in April while WDC ascended 60%. headline: Seagate Is Sold Out Through 2027 As AI Reshapes Hard Drive Demand
summary: Seagate (NASDAQ: STX) is sold out. Management confirmed that nearline capacity is almost fully allocated through calendar 2027, a level of forward visibility that is rare for a hardware company. AI infrastructure buildout has consumed supply faster than the industry can respond, and Seagate's Mozaic HAMR (Heat-Assisted Magnetic Recording) technology is the primary reason hyperscalers are locking in multi-year contracts. headline: Meta stock sinks after raising full-year forecast on AI spend
summary: Meta Platforms (META) stock sinks in Thursday's pre-market trading after raising its capex spending forecast on AI to between $125 billion and $145 billion. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland dive into Meta's first quarter earnings results and what to make of the Facebook parent company's continued investments into artificial intelligence.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Seagate (STX) After Its Recent AI Storage-Fueled Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Seagate Technology Holdings' share price still makes sense after its run, the starting point is understanding what the current market valuation is really pricing in. The stock last closed at US$643.30, with returns of 10.9% over 7 days, 77.5% over 30 days, 123.7% year to date and a very large return over 1 year that is more than 7x the starting point, plus strong multi year gains.
